case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS MARTIN GLORIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN GLORIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,776.29 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN GLORIA MARTIN MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
